title: Lesson 585: 真逆, 正に, 真面目...

items.gloss: by no means; never!; well, I never!; you don't say!; certainly (not); something unexpected; emergency; currently; for the time being; presently; for now; indeed; really; truly; unexpectedly
exactly; surely; certainly; just; right then; just then; at that moment; just (about to); on the verge (of doing or happening); duly; naturally
one's true character; one's true self; one's true worth; serious; earnest
poor; needy; lacking (quantity and quality-wise); scanty; skimpy; slight; inadequate
increasingly; more and more; decreasingly (when declining); less and less
